_note: Hand-verified ground truth for the 09/2022 section of the multi-month Michpal PDF. income_tax is intentionally omitted because no מס הכנסה line exists in this payslip (employee was below tax threshold). net_payable=5636.85 is לתשלום (after voluntary deductions), not שכר נטו=5936.85 — the תשלום to bank is what we treat as net.
